evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file with responsive layout, sidebar navigation, styled code blocks, and proper formatting. The output should be saved as test-simple.html.

evals.prompt: Convert evals/test-complex.md to HTML with full styling
evals.expected_output: A professional HTML page with tables, code highlighting, multiple content boxes (info, warning, success, highlight), nested lists, and all interactive features (smooth scrolling, back-to-top button, active navigation).

evals.prompt: Convert evals/test-chinese.md to HTML, ensuring proper Chinese character support
evals.expected_output: An HTML page with proper Chinese font rendering, UTF-8 encoding, and all content displayed correctly. Should include all styling features and maintain the Chinese content integrity.
